privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for sugar_env mauna_loa_co2_analysis_html task by verifying that the data is a custom synthetic CSV dataset explicitly injected via setup_task.sh (contradicting the claim that it is an authentic NOAA dataset, as real NOAA Mauna Loa records differ slightly). The expected output paths for the python script and html report match the task metadata, as does the target journal title 'Mauna Loa CO2 Report'. The four decadal averages (345.56, 360.43, 378.56, 400.20) and the maximum year-over-year jump (2016) were independently confirmed by calculating the values directly from the injected CSV.
